component.name: Krema
component.summary: A lightweight dock for KDE Plasma 6 — spiritual successor to Latte Dock

description.p: Krema is a lightweight dock for KDE Plasma 6, designed as a spiritual successor to Latte Dock. It provides quick access to your favorite applications with smooth parabolic zoom animations, window previews via PipeWire, and deep integration with KDE Plasma desktop features.

Features include multiple background styles (transparent, tinted, acrylic frosted glass), drag-and-drop reordering, smart visibility modes that dodge or hide behind windows, and global keyboard shortcuts for quick app launching.
Built from scratch with C++23 and KDE Frameworks 6, Krema is Wayland-native and uses Kirigami for its settings UI, ensuring a fully native KDE Plasma experience.
